changelog:
- 默认输出精度大幅提升，成品细节更精细
- 高精度模式处理速度显著优化
- 新增视频教程入口，快速上手
- 修复矢量模式下部分形状未正确分离的问题
- 修复直接转换时图层预览不显示的问题
- 修复配方编辑器长时间未操作后任务丢失的问题
changelog_en:
- Significantly improved default output precision for finer details
- Optimized processing speed in high-precision mode
- Added video tutorial for quick start
- Fixed shape separation issues in vector mode
- Fixed layer preview not showing in direct convert mode
- Fixed recipe editor task loss after prolonged idle time
